message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

actor "Actor" as actor1
circle "EventBus" as eventbus1
rectangle "Service Orchestrator" as so_box {
    component "so" as so1
}
rectangle "Software Defined Infrastructure" as sdi_box {
    component "storageresource" as storage1
}

actor "Actor" as actor2
circle "EventBus" as eventbus2
component "so" as so2
component "storageresource" as storage2

actor1 -> so1 : Version Application Stack
activate so1
so1 -> storage1 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
activate storage1
storage1 --> eventbus1 : data.list
deactivate storage1
so1 -> storage1 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
activate storage1
storage1 --> eventbus2 : data.list
deactivate storage1
deactivate so1

@enduml
```
